summary: The next steps should involve continued observation and possibly repeat urinalysis if any new symptoms arise rather than immediate diagnostic testing such as an ultrasound given this was her first UTI that responded well to treatment without complications. Close follow-up will help determine whether additional interventions may be necessary based on symptom recurrence patterns over time but no urgent need exists currently beyond routine care
